div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Third Secretary of Embassy in Spain (Wendelin)
div.p: 198. Your X–323, November 18, 8 p.m. We shall be glad to give our support to any practicable steps aiming to bring about the cessation of artillery and air bombardment of the civil population of Madrid. We shall, therefore, appreciate your keeping us informed as to the reaction of the several Governments to the resolution of the diplomatic corps reported in your telegram under reference.

In accordance with the request of the Chargé d’Affaires of Argentina the text of the first paragraph of your telegram is being transmitted to the Ministry of Foreign Relations at Buenos Aires through our Embassy there.
